known_limitations: CC3 editor TypeScript auto-compilation did not pick up source changes — compiled JS chunk was patched directly. Changes will be overwritten if the CC3 editor recompiles. Source TS changes are correct and will produce correct output when properly compiled.
CC3 preview has 50-second splash screen before game content appears. Not a bug.
